# Module N — <Name>

> One report per completed module. Filed at `docs/modules/NN-<name>.md`.

## 1. Requirements
What this module must deliver and why (link to roadmap).

## 2. Architecture
Where it sits in the system. Mermaid diagram(s). Link to relevant ADRs.

## 3. Design rationale
Key decisions, alternatives rejected, trade-offs accepted.

## 4. Implementation
What was built. Key files. Notable patterns used.

## 5. Testing
Test strategy, coverage, what is deliberately not tested and why.

## 6. Future improvements
Known limitations, hardening backlog.
